creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2007-12-12 13:12:11 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    japanese             Makefile 
  Added files:
    japanese/p5-DateTime-Format-Japanese Makefile distinfo 
                                         pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  This module implements a DateTime::Format module
  that can read Japanese date notations and create a
  DateTime object, and vice versa.
  
  Author: Daisuke Maki <dmaki@cpan.org>
  WWW:    http://search.cpan.org/~dmaki/DateTime-Format-Japanese/
  
  PR:             ports/117847
  Submitted by:   Masahiro Teramoto <markun at onohara.to>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.672     +1 -0      ports/japanese/Makefile
  1.1       +35 -0     ports/japanese/p5-DateTime-Format-Japanese/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/japanese/p5-DateTime-Format-Japanese/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +6 -0      ports/japanese/p5-DateTime-Format-Japanese/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +11 -0     ports/japanese/p5-DateTime-Format-Japanese/pkg-plist (new)
